title: Blank profile
description: Bare-minimum starting point. One GenericNetworkAdapter, one empty port, one empty method. Replace the placeholders with your device's address and commands.

title: Demo
description: A multi-device profile showing every supported adapter type (GenericNetworkAdapter, iTach IP2CC, USB2Serial) plus scenes, rules, and response filters. Useful for exploring the editor and the preview.

file: Sharp TCP Display Zoom Room Control Profile.json
title: Sharp display (TCP)
description: Network-controllable Sharp display over TCP with login/password handshake response filters.

file: Sharp RS-232 USB-Serial Zoom Room Control Profile.json
title: Sharp display (USB-to-serial RS-232)
description: Sharp display driven over RS-232 by a USB-to-serial adapter attached to the Zoom Room PC.

file: Sony RS-232 Zoom Room Control Profile.json
title: Sony display (TCP to RS-232 interface)
description: Sony display controlled via RS-232, addressed over TCP (e.g. through a StarTech I13P serial-over-TCP adapter).
